docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DOMINQUEZ, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, TRACY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
